title: Property Consultant - Hiranandani Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Hiranandani Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Hiranandani Group has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hiranandani Group:
Hiranandani Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hiranandani Group!
